title: Local review catches missing overwrite guard and callback identity setup

provenance.originSummary: Synthetic benchmark scenario designed to exercise the rule directly.
provenance.whyItMattered: Use this case to benchmark whether local review now catches both the create-time import-check feature gate regression and the callback identity regression in the same Go create path.
provenance.genericCondition: Synthetic review case focused on create-time overwrite gating and callback-based Resource Identity handling.

description: A synthetic local-review scenario where a Go create path unconditionally returns an import-as-exists error and uses a callback-based create helper without wiring `sdk.SetIDAndIdentityCallback(...)` for a resource that supports Resource Identity.

scope.notes: Synthetic review case focused on create-time overwrite gating and callback-based Resource Identity handling.

mustCatch.description: The review should flag an unconditional import-as-exists branch when the create path does not honor `SkipImportCheckOnCreateAndAllowOverwritingExistingResources`.
The review should flag callback-based create flows that omit `sdk.SetIDAndIdentityCallback(...)` for resources that support Resource Identity.

mustNotFlag.description: The review must not treat callback-based create helpers as invalid by themselves when the real defect is the missing ID-plus-identity callback wiring.

notes: Use this case to benchmark whether local review now catches both the create-time import-check feature gate regression and the callback identity regression in the same Go create path.
